core.description: Shared authentication (JWT), Granular RBAC, Reception Management, and i18n framework. Hardening with Zod and Service Layer.

it_management.description: IT Assets, Infrastructure Monitor, Secret Vault, and IT Ticketing. Logic extracted to Service Layer.

laundry_management.description: End-to-end laundry operations: Order lifecycle, Mobile Logistics/Driver Dashboard, CRM, and Pricing Catalog.

ticketing_system.description: Dual-stream ticketing: Internal IT vs. Customer Service Laundry. Unified service layer integration.

migrations.description: Initialized project memory and protocol baseline.
Implemented JWT auth, multi-tenant middleware, and modular ticket dashboards.
Deployed RBAC, Infrastructure Monitoring, Secret Vault, Driver Dashboard, and Global Metrics.
Upgraded to Advanced V2 Protocol and initialized production baseline.
Full project rebuild: Service Layer extraction, Zod validation integration, and deep UI hardening.

debt.issue: Production PostgreSQL migration (Currently SQLite for dev/PoC)
